title: GitHub - smashah/traicer: Seller-operated sovereign capture service for Traice Market
excerpt: Seller-operated sovereign capture service for Traice Market - smashah/traicer
content_html:
Traicer is for developers who want to offer selected AI coding conversations for potential sale through Traice Market without giving the platform a copy of their working history. You are the seller and your storage remains the source of truth. Traicer runs on your machine, captures only supported provider calls you deliberately route through it, removes known secrets, encrypts accepted traces, and writes the ciphertext to S3-compatible storage you control.

Traice Market is a work in progress, and account access is not generally available yet. Traicer remains useful before it opens: encrypted trace objects stay in your bucket, while signed safe metadata waits in the durable local outbox. When you connect an account later and restart Traicer, it submits that pending metadata idempotently, allowing those existing traces to enter marketplace workflows without uploading their raw contents. To discuss the project or hear when access opens, join the Traice Discord.

A trace is the redacted request body and successful response body from one supported Anthropic or OpenAI call, together with its provider, model, client, timestamp, token usage, response status, and redaction report. If the client sent system instructions, code, repository context, tool definitions, tool calls, or tool results inside that provider payload, those values can be present after redaction. Traicer does not independently crawl your repository, watch processes, or record unrelated network traffic.

Warning

Traicer is an operator preview, not a general-purpose data-loss-prevention system. Its built-in detectors cannot guarantee that every sensitive value will be found. Begin with non-sensitive work, verify release checksums, and review the preview limits before using it with production repositories.

See it working

This is the current CLI output shape with synthetic identifiers and no trace contents. It shows a healthy local capture service running without a Traice Market account, then the safe local inventory created by two successful provider calls.

$ traicer status
Daemon: running (pid 48120)
Capture: healthy
Storage database: ready
Seller storage: ready
Gateway: ready at http://127.0.0.1:<random-port>
Marketplace: account not connected
Manifests: 0 reconciled, 2 pending

$ traicer traces list --limit 2
TRACE ID                              STATE             PROVIDER    CLIENT          CAPTURED
11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111  manifest_pending  anthropic   claude-code     2026-07-18T09:42:11.000Z
22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222  manifest_pending  openai      codex           2026-07-18T09:39:04.000Z

traces list exposes bounded lifecycle metadata only. Use traicer explore when you deliberately want to download, verify, decrypt, and inspect one of the underlying traces.

What stays where

Location Data kept there
Your machine Provider traffic you routed through Traicer; secret stripping, redaction, canonicalisation, encryption, signing keys, and the local inventory database
Your S3-compatible bucket AES-256-GCM encrypted trace objects and temporary encrypted delivery objects
Traice Market, when connected Signed safe metadata: provider, model, client, hour-rounded capture time, token and tool-call counts, encrypted size, redaction counts, hashes and opaque commitments, pipeline versions, and storage-integrity status

Traice Market does not receive the request or response body, provider or storage credentials, encryption keys, raw object location, or a reusable storage credential. “Content-free inventory” means that the marketplace receives the metadata listed above, not that it receives no metadata. Those fields are designed to support compatibility and size checks before any seller-approved content delivery.

From capture to an optional sale

  1. Route one supported call. Your coding client sends a request through Traicer's loopback gateway or explicit proxy. Traicer accepts only configured providers, methods, and paths.
  2. Protect it locally. The provider credential is forwarded to the fixed HTTPS provider, but transport credentials are removed before a capture record is constructed. The accepted request and successful response bodies then pass through redaction and canonicalisation.
  3. Commit ciphertext to your storage. Traicer encrypts the canonical trace locally and reports capture success only after seller storage returns matching metadata and bytes.
  4. Queue safe metadata. Traicer signs the content-free inventory record. Without a Traice Market account it stays in the durable local outbox. After you add an account credential and restart Traicer, startup reconciliation submits pending records idempotently.
  5. Approve any commercial action. Capture alone does not create a dataset, accept a sale, or prepare delivery. A seller-approved delivery decrypts only the selected traces on your machine, re-encrypts them for that delivery, and creates a short-lived buyer capability.

Reconciliation makes existing local-first captures available to later marketplace workflows; it does not upload the trace body, list a dataset, approve a sale, or promise a buyer. Keep the bucket objects and local Traicer configuration, including its encrypted key material, because Traicer needs them for any later seller-approved delivery.

To connect an account later, stop capture, add TRAICER_MARKETPLACE_CREDENTIAL to ~/.config/traicer/.env.local, encrypt the new value, and restart. The next startup reconciles the pending safe metadata:

bunx @traice-market/traicer stop
bunx @traice-market/traicer secrets
bunx @traice-market/traicer start --detach

Make the first capture

You need an Anthropic or OpenAI credential and a dedicated Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, or compatible S3 bucket. A Traice Market account is optional at capture time. The desktop app bundles the local service; the CLI requires Bun 1.3 or newer, and managed Cloudflare/AWS deployment shells out to pnpm, which must already be installed.

CLI initialization is AI-provider agnostic: one storage configuration includes both Anthropic and OpenAI capture routes. The client launched with traicer run, or the API path used with a revealed gateway URL, selects the route for each session.

Complete Cloudflare R2 + CLI path

This path creates the bucket and reaches a verifiable first trace. Wrangler account discovery and Alchemy deployment authentication are separate: Traicer reads only public account metadata from Wrangler, while Alchemy handles its own browser-based deployment login.

  1. Install and authenticate Wrangler, then initialise Traicer and explicitly deploy the generated R2 stack:

    wrangler login
bunx @traice-market/traicer init --storage cloudflare-r2 --deploy

  2. After deployment succeeds, create a Cloudflare R2 S3 API token with object read/write access restricted to the generated bucket. init does not create or reuse this credential. Put its access-key ID and secret into ~/.config/traicer/.env.local; leave the generated varlock(...) references unchanged.

  3. Encrypt the external credentials, start the service in the background, and confirm that its storage probe passes:

    bunx @traice-market/traicer secrets
bunx @traice-market/traicer start --detach
bunx @traice-market/traicer status

  4. Inside the repository you want to associate with the session, link it once and launch Claude through a temporary scoped route:

    bunx @traice-market/traicer project link
bunx @traice-market/traicer run -- claude

  5. Send a successful Claude request, exit the session, then verify the safe local row and inspect it deliberately:

    bunx @traice-market/traicer traces list
bunx @traice-market/traicer explore

For AWS or an existing compatible service, use the matching command in Storage. init never overwrites an existing configuration, and cloud deployment occurs only with --deploy or explicit interactive approval.

Desktop path

Use the desktop app when the bucket and scoped S3 credentials already exist and you want guided configuration:

  1. Download the DMG, Windows EXE/MSI, or Linux DEB from the latest release and verify its checksum.
  2. Enter the bucket endpoint, bucket name, region, prefix, and scoped storage credentials. Choose local-first capture when you do not yet have a Traice Market account.
  3. Start Traicer and copy the displayed gateway URL into the coding client's provider base-URL setting while keeping its normal provider API key configured.
  4. Send a supported request and check Local trace lifecycle for the new safe summary.

The displayed loopback URL contains a bearer capability. Do not commit it, place it in a shared shell profile, or include it in screenshots and issues.

What redaction does today

The current strict-default pipeline removes transport headers such as authorization, cookie, x-api-key, proxy authorization, OpenAI organisation/project headers, and any header name that looks like a key, credential, password, secret, session, or token. Those headers are not part of the canonical trace schema.

Within request and response bodies, it replaces sensitive field names and recognises these built-in string patterns:

  • private keys;
  • OpenAI-style keys;
  • AWS access-key IDs;
  • JSON Web Tokens;
  • PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB connection URLs;
  • email addresses.

The redaction report records only detector categories and replacement counts. Detection is necessarily incomplete, so route only work you are willing to inspect and use traicer explore before committing any dataset.

Inspect and export your traces

Owner access reads the local inventory while the daemon and traice.market are offline. A reveal accepts only a known local trace ID, ciphertext hash, or exact object key already recorded under the configured prefix; it cannot browse arbitrary bucket keys.

# Safe metadata only
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces list

# Interactive TUI with lazy download/decrypt progress
bunx @traice-market/traicer explore

# Deliberate single-trace reveal
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces show <trace-id>

# Explicit export and plaintext-cache control
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces export <trace-id> --output ./trace.json
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces cache status
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces cache clear

Before returning plaintext, Traicer verifies the ciphertext hash, decrypts locally, verifies the canonical hash, and validates the trace schema. Inspected plaintext is gzip-compressed under the configuration directory, capped at 512 MiB by default, and removed after seven days. Terminal output, confirmed clipboard copies, the desktop/TUI detail pane, and exported files contain sensitive plaintext.

Capture and compatibility

Traicer does not change the system proxy or inject itself into coding tools. Fixed-gateway routes outside the allowlist are rejected; selected explicit-proxy traffic outside the capture set is forwarded without becoming a trace.

Provider Captured after a successful response Forwarded without capture
Anthropic POST /v1/messages Token counting and model lookup
OpenAI POST /v1/responses, POST /v1/chat/completions Embeddings and model lookup

Provider forwarding is fail-open: if the provider responds but later persistence fails, the client still receives that response. Persistence is fail-closed: an unknown policy, parser, redaction, encryption, storage, or signing state creates no seller object or marketable inventory.

Compatibility and preview limits

As of 18 July 2026, the repository documents this acceptance evidence:

Surface Current evidence
Claude Code 2.1.212 on macOS through Anthropic Messages Manual end-to-end acceptance
OpenAI Responses and Chat Completions Unit and synthetic gateway evidence
Codex and OpenCode scoped launchers Unit and synthetic launcher evidence
macOS desktop Apple Silicon and Intel DMGs are published; not notarised or production-signed
Windows desktop EXE/MSI installers are published; not production-signed
Debian/Ubuntu desktop DEB package is published; clean-machine coverage remains a release gate

The version-one threat model assumes one local desktop user. Traicer cannot protect traces from malware running with that user's privileges or from a compromised operating system. Security claims remain provisional until the corresponding packet-capture, clean-machine, crash-recovery, and external-review gates pass.

Documentation and support

  • Getting started — the complete clean-machine walkthrough.
  • CLI reference — service commands, routing, trace access, and generated files.
  • Desktop app — installation, local CA trust, updates, and capture controls.
  • Client configuration — fixed gateway and explicit-proxy setup.
  • Storage — required permissions and storage-backend setup.
  • Architecture, threat model, and telemetry contract — the security design in detail.
  • Troubleshooting — startup, routing, storage, and capture failures.

Open reproducible, content-free bugs in GitHub Issues. Report vulnerabilities through GitHub's private security advisory flow. Never include raw traces, prompts, source code, credentials, private keys, storage URLs, capability-bearing gateway URLs, or unredacted diagnostics in an issue.

Licence status

Official packages and installers are published for operator-preview evaluation, but the source repository has no distribution licence. Source availability does not grant permission to redistribute the code, publish modified distributions, or describe Traicer as open source.

blocks.html_en: Traice Market, when connected

sentences.en: Traice Market, when connected
sentences.zh: Traice 市场，连接后

blocks.html_en: Signed safe metadata: provider, model, client, hour-rounded capture time, token and tool-call counts, encrypted size, redaction counts, hashes and opaque commitments, pipeline versions, and storage-integrity status

sentences.en: Signed safe metadata: provider, model, client, hour-rounded capture time, token and tool-call counts, encrypted size, redaction counts, hashes and opaque commitments, pipeline versions, and storage-integrity status
sentences.zh: 签名的安全元数据：提供者、模型、客户端、小时捕获时间、令牌和工具调用计数、加密大小、编辑计数、哈希和不透明承诺、管道版本和存储完整性状态

blocks.html_en: Traice Market does not receive the request or response body, provider or storage credentials, encryption keys, raw object location, or a reusable storage credential. “Content-free inventory” means that the marketplace receives the metadata listed above, not that it receives no metadata. Those fields are designed to support compatibility and size checks before any seller-approved content delivery.

sentences.en: Traice Market does not receive the request or response body, provider or storage credentials, encryption keys, raw object location, or a reusable storage credential.
sentences.zh: Traice Market 不会收到请求或响应主体、提供者或存储凭证、加密密钥、原始对象位置或可重用存储凭证。

sentences.en: “Content-free inventory” means that the marketplace receives the metadata listed above, not that it receives no metadata.
sentences.zh: “无内容库存”意味着市场接收上面列出的元数据，而不是不接收元数据。

sentences.en: Those fields are designed to support compatibility and size checks before any seller-approved content delivery.
sentences.zh: 这些字段旨在支持在任何卖家批准的内容交付之前进行兼容性和尺寸检查。

blocks.html_en: From capture to an optional sale

sentences.en: From capture to an optional sale
sentences.zh: 从捕获到选择性出售

blocks.html_en: • Route one supported call. Your coding client sends a request through Traicer's loopback gateway or explicit proxy. Traicer accepts only configured providers, methods, and paths.

sentences.en: Route one supported call.
sentences.zh: 路由一支持的呼叫。

sentences.en: Your coding client sends a request through Traicer's loopback gateway or explicit proxy.
sentences.zh: 您的编码客户端通过 Traicer 的环回网关或显式代理发送请求。

sentences.en: Traicer accepts only configured providers, methods, and paths.
sentences.zh: Traicer 仅接受配置的提供程序、方法和路径。

blocks.html_en: • Protect it locally. The provider credential is forwarded to the fixed HTTPS provider, but transport credentials are removed before a capture record is constructed. The accepted request and successful response bodies then pass through redaction and canonicalisation.

sentences.en: Protect it locally.
sentences.zh: 在本地保护它。

sentences.en: The provider credential is forwarded to the fixed HTTPS provider, but transport credentials are removed before a capture record is constructed.
sentences.zh: 提供者凭证被转发到固定的 HTTPS 提供者，但传输凭证在构建捕获记录之前被删除。

sentences.en: The accepted request and successful response bodies then pass through redaction and canonicalisation.
sentences.zh: 然后，接受的请求和成功的响应主体将经过编辑和规范化。

blocks.html_en: • Commit ciphertext to your storage. Traicer encrypts the canonical trace locally and reports capture success only after seller storage returns matching metadata and bytes.

sentences.en: Commit ciphertext to your storage.
sentences.zh: 将密文提交到您的存储中。

sentences.en: Traicer encrypts the canonical trace locally and reports capture success only after seller storage returns matching metadata and bytes.
sentences.zh: Traicer 在本地对规范跟踪进行加密，并且仅在卖方存储返回匹配的元数据和字节后才报告捕获成功。

blocks.html_en: • Queue safe metadata. Traicer signs the content-free inventory record. Without a Traice Market account it stays in the durable local outbox. After you add an account credential and restart Traicer, startup reconciliation submits pending records idempotently.

sentences.en: Queue safe metadata.
sentences.zh: 队列安全元数据。

sentences.en: Traicer signs the content-free inventory record.
sentences.zh: Tracerer 签署无内容库存记录。

sentences.en: Without a Traice Market account it stays in the durable local outbox.
sentences.zh: 如果没有 Traice Market 帐户，它会保留在持久的本地发件箱中。

sentences.en: After you add an account credential and restart Traicer, startup reconciliation submits pending records idempotently.
sentences.zh: 添加帐户凭据并重新启动 Traicer 后，启动协调会幂等地提交待处理记录。

blocks.html_en: • Approve any commercial action. Capture alone does not create a dataset, accept a sale, or prepare delivery. A seller-approved delivery decrypts only the selected traces on your machine, re-encrypts them for that delivery, and creates a short-lived buyer capability.

sentences.en: Approve any commercial action.
sentences.zh: 批准任何商业行为。

sentences.en: Capture alone does not create a dataset, accept a sale, or prepare delivery.
sentences.zh: 单独捕获不会创建数据集、接受销售或准备交付。

sentences.en: A seller-approved delivery decrypts only the selected traces on your machine, re-encrypts them for that delivery, and creates a short-lived buyer capability.
sentences.zh: 卖方批准的交付仅解密您计算机上选定的跟踪，为该交付重新加密它们，并创建短暂的买方能力。

blocks.html_en: Reconciliation makes existing local-first captures available to later marketplace workflows; it does not upload the trace body, list a dataset, approve a sale, or promise a buyer. Keep the bucket objects and local Traicer configuration, including its encrypted key material, because Traicer needs them for any later seller-approved delivery.

sentences.en: Reconciliation makes existing local-first captures available to later marketplace workflows; it does not upload the trace body, list a dataset, approve a sale, or promise a buyer.
sentences.zh: 协调使现有的本地优先捕获可用于以后的市场工作流程；它不会上传跟踪正文、列出数据集、批准销售或向买家做出承诺。

sentences.en: Keep the bucket objects and local Traicer configuration, including its encrypted key material, because Traicer needs them for any later seller-approved delivery.
sentences.zh: 保留存储桶对象和本地 Traicer 配置，包括其加密的密钥材料，因为 Traicer 需要它们来进行任何后续卖家批准的交付。

blocks.html_en: To connect an account later, stop capture, add TRAICER_MARKETPLACE_CREDENTIAL to ~/.config/traicer/.env.local, encrypt the new value, and restart. The next startup reconciles the pending safe metadata:

sentences.en: To connect an account later, stop capture, add TRAICER_MARKETPLACE_CREDENTIAL to ~/.config/traicer/.env.local, encrypt the new value, and restart.
sentences.zh: 要稍后连接帐户，请停止捕获，将 TRAICER_MARKETPLACE_CREDENTIAL 添加到 ~/.config/traicer/.env.local，加密新值，然后重新启动。

sentences.en: The next startup reconciles the pending safe metadata:
sentences.zh: 下一次启动将协调待处理的安全元数据：

sentences.en: Make the first capture
sentences.zh: 进行第一次捕获

blocks.html_en: You need an Anthropic or OpenAI credential and a dedicated Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, or compatible S3 bucket. A Traice Market account is optional at capture time. The desktop app bundles the local service; the CLI requires Bun 1.3 or newer, and managed Cloudflare/AWS deployment shells out to pnpm, which must already be installed.

sentences.en: You need an Anthropic or OpenAI credential and a dedicated Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, or compatible S3 bucket.
sentences.zh: 您需要 Anthropic 或 OpenAI 凭证以及专用的 Cloudflare R2、AWS S3 或兼容的 S3 存储桶。

sentences.en: A Traice Market account is optional at capture time.
sentences.zh: Traice 市场帐户在捕获时是可选的。

sentences.en: The desktop app bundles the local service; the CLI requires Bun 1.3 or newer, and managed Cloudflare/AWS deployment shells out to pnpm, which must already be installed.
sentences.zh: 桌面应用捆绑本地服务； CLI 需要 Bun 1.3 或更高版本，并且托管 Cloudflare/AWS 部署 shell 必须已安装到 pnpm。

blocks.html_en: CLI initialization is AI-provider agnostic: one storage configuration includes both Anthropic and OpenAI capture routes. The client launched with traicer run, or the API path used with a revealed gateway URL, selects the route for each session.

sentences.en: CLI initialization is AI-provider agnostic: one storage configuration includes both Anthropic and OpenAI capture routes.
sentences.zh: CLI 初始化与 AI 提供商无关：一种存储配置包括 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 捕获路由。

sentences.en: The client launched with traicer run, or the API path used with a revealed gateway URL, selects the route for each session.
sentences.zh: 通过 Tracerer 运行启动的客户端或与显示的网关 URL 一起使用的 API 路径，为每个会话选择路由。

blocks.html_en: Complete Cloudflare R2 + CLI path

sentences.en: Complete Cloudflare R2 + CLI path
sentences.zh: 完整的 Cloudflare R2 + CLI 路径

blocks.html_en: This path creates the bucket and reaches a verifiable first trace. Wrangler account discovery and Alchemy deployment authentication are separate: Traicer reads only public account metadata from Wrangler, while Alchemy handles its own browser-based deployment login.

sentences.en: This path creates the bucket and reaches a verifiable first trace.
sentences.zh: 该路径创建存储桶并到达可验证的第一条踪迹。

sentences.en: Wrangler account discovery and Alchemy deployment authentication are separate: Traicer reads only public account metadata from Wrangler, while Alchemy handles its own browser-based deployment login.
sentences.zh: Wrangler 帐户发现和 Alchemy 部署身份验证是分开的：Traicer 仅从 Wrangler 读取公共帐户元数据，而 Alchemy 处理自己的基于浏览器的部署登录。

sentences.zh: 安装并验证 Wrangler，然后初始化 Traicer 并显式部署生成的 R2 堆栈：wrangler login Bunx @traice-market/traicer init --storage cloudflare-r2 --deploy

Put its access-key ID and secret into ~/.config/traicer/.env.local; leave the generated varlock(...) references unchanged.

sentences.zh: 部署成功后，创建 Cloudflare R2 S3 API 令牌，并将对象读/写访问权限限制为生成的存储桶。

sentences.zh: 发送成功的 Claude 请求，退出会话，然后验证安全本地行并仔细检查它： Bunx @traice-market/traicer 跟踪列表 Bunx @traice-market/traicer explore

sentences.en: For AWS or an existing compatible service, use the matching command in Storage.
sentences.zh: 对于 AWS 或现有的兼容服务，请使用存储中的匹配命令。

sentences.en: init never overwrites an existing configuration, and cloud deployment occurs only with --deploy or explicit interactive approval.
sentences.zh: init 永远不会覆盖现有配置，云部署仅在 --deploy 或显式交互批准的情况下进行。

blocks.html_en: Desktop path

sentences.en: Desktop path
sentences.zh: 桌面路径

blocks.html_en: Use the desktop app when the bucket and scoped S3 credentials already exist and you want guided configuration:

sentences.en: Use the desktop app when the bucket and scoped S3 credentials already exist and you want guided configuration:
sentences.zh: 当存储桶和范围 S3 凭证已存在并且您需要引导式配置时，请使用桌面应用程序：

blocks.html_en: • Download the DMG, Windows EXE/MSI, or Linux DEB from the latest release and verify its checksum.

sentences.en: Download the DMG, Windows EXE/MSI, or Linux DEB from the latest release and verify its checksum.
sentences.zh: 从最新版本下载 DMG、Windows EXE/MSI 或 Linux DEB 并验证其校验和。

blocks.html_en: • Enter the bucket endpoint, bucket name, region, prefix, and scoped storage credentials. Choose local-first capture when you do not yet have a Traice Market account.

sentences.en: Enter the bucket endpoint, bucket name, region, prefix, and scoped storage credentials.
sentences.zh: 输入存储桶端点、存储桶名称、区域、前缀和范围存储凭据。

sentences.en: Choose local-first capture when you do not yet have a Traice Market account.
sentences.zh: 当您还没有 Traice Market 帐户时，请选择本地优先捕获。

sentences.en: Start Traicer and copy the displayed gateway URL into the coding client's provider base-URL setting while keeping its normal provider API key configured.
sentences.zh: 启动 Traicer 并将显示的网关 URL 复制到编码客户端的提供程序基本 URL 设置中，同时保持配置的正常提供程序 API 密钥。

blocks.html_en: • Send a supported request and check Local trace lifecycle for the new safe summary.

sentences.en: Send a supported request and check Local trace lifecycle for the new safe summary.
sentences.zh: 发送支持的请求并检查本地跟踪生命周期以获取新的安全摘要。

sentences.en: Do not commit it, place it in a shared shell profile, or include it in screenshots and issues.
sentences.zh: 不要提交它，将其放置在共享 shell 配置文件中，或将其包含在屏幕截图和问题中。

blocks.html_en: What redaction does today

sentences.en: What redaction does today
sentences.zh: 今天的修订有什么作用

blocks.html_en: The current strict-default pipeline removes transport headers such as authorization, cookie, x-api-key, proxy authorization, OpenAI organisation/project headers, and any header name that looks like a key, credential, password, secret, session, or token. Those headers are not part of the canonical trace schema.

sentences.en: The current strict-default pipeline removes transport headers such as authorization, cookie, x-api-key, proxy authorization, OpenAI organisation/project headers, and any header name that looks like a key, credential, password, secret, session, or token.
sentences.zh: 当前的严格默认管道删除了传输标头，例如授权、cookie、x-api-key、代理授权、OpenAI 组织/项目标头以及任何看起来像密钥、凭证、密码、秘密、会话或令牌的标头名称。

sentences.en: Those headers are not part of the canonical trace schema.
sentences.zh: 这些标头不是规范跟踪模式的一部分。

sentences.zh: JSON 网络令牌；

sentences.zh: PostgreSQL、MySQL 和 MongoDB 连接 URL；

sentences.en: email addresses.

sentences.zh: 编辑报告仅记录探测器类别和替换计数。

sentences.en: Inspect and export your traces
sentences.zh: 检查并导出您的痕迹

blocks.html_en: Owner access reads the local inventory while the daemon and traice.market are offline. A reveal accepts only a known local trace ID, ciphertext hash, or exact object key already recorded under the configured prefix; it cannot browse arbitrary bucket keys.

sentences.en: Owner access reads the local inventory while the daemon and traice.market are offline.
sentences.zh: 当守护进程和traice.market处于离线状态时，所有者访问权限会读取本地库存。

sentences.en: A reveal accepts only a known local trace ID, ciphertext hash, or exact object key already recorded under the configured prefix; it cannot browse arbitrary bucket keys.
sentences.zh: Reveal 仅接受已知的本地跟踪 ID、密文哈希或已记录在配置的前缀下的确切对象密钥；它无法浏览任意存储桶键。

blocks.html_en: Before returning plaintext, Traicer verifies the ciphertext hash, decrypts locally, verifies the canonical hash, and validates the trace schema. Inspected plaintext is gzip-compressed under the configuration directory, capped at 512 MiB by default, and removed after seven days. Terminal output, confirmed clipboard copies, the desktop/TUI detail pane, and exported files contain sensitive plaintext.

sentences.en: Before returning plaintext, Traicer verifies the ciphertext hash, decrypts locally, verifies the canonical hash, and validates the trace schema.
sentences.zh: 在返回明文之前，Tracer 会验证密文哈希、本地解密、验证规范哈希并验证跟踪模式。

sentences.en: Inspected plaintext is gzip-compressed under the configuration directory, capped at 512 MiB by default, and removed after seven days.
sentences.zh: 检查的明文在配置目录下进行 gzip 压缩，默认上限为 512 MiB，并在 7 天后删除。

sentences.en: Terminal output, confirmed clipboard copies, the desktop/TUI detail pane, and exported files contain sensitive plaintext.
sentences.zh: 终端输出、确认的剪贴板副本、桌面/TUI 详细信息窗格和导出的文件包含敏感纯文本。

blocks.html_en: Capture and compatibility

sentences.en: Capture and compatibility

content_html_zh:
Traicer 适合那些希望通过 Traice Market 提供选定的 AI 编码对话以进行潜在销售的开发人员，而无需向平台提供其工作历史副本。 您是卖家，您的存储仍然是事实的来源。 Traicer 在您的计算机上运行，​​仅捕获您故意通过它路由的支持的提供商调用，删除已知的秘密，加密接受的跟踪，并将密文写入您控制的 S3 兼容存储。

Traice Market 正在进行中，帐户访问尚未普遍可用。 Traicer 在打开之前仍然有用：加密的跟踪对象保留在您的存储桶中，而签名的安全元数据则在持久的本地发件箱中等待。 当您稍后连接帐户并重新启动 Traicer 时，它会幂等地提交待处理的元数据，从而允许这些现有跟踪进入市场工作流程，而无需上传其原始内容。 要讨论该项目或听取访问开放时间，请加入 Traice Discord。

跟踪是来自一个受支持的 Anthropic 或 OpenAI 调用的经过编辑的请求正文和成功响应正文，及其提供者、模型、客户端、时间戳、令牌使用情况、响应状态和编辑报告。 If the client sent system instructions, code, repository context, tool definitions, tool calls, or tool results inside that provider payload, those values can be present after redaction. Traicer 不会独立抓取您的存储库、监视进程或记录不相关的网络流量。

警告

Traicer 是一个操作员预览版，而不是一个通用的数据丢失防护系统。 其内置检测器不能保证找到每个敏感值。 从非敏感工作开始，验证发布校验和，并在将其用于生产存储库之前检查预览限制。

看到它工作

这是当前的 CLI 输出形状，带有合成标识符，没有跟踪内容。 它显示了在没有 Traice Market 帐户的情况下运行的健康本地捕获服务，以及由两次成功的提供商调用创建的安全本地库存。

$ traicer status
Daemon: running (pid 48120)
Capture: healthy
Storage database: ready
Seller storage: ready
Gateway: ready at http://127.0.0.1:<random-port>
Marketplace: account not connected
Manifests: 0 reconciled, 2 pending

$ traicer traces list --limit 2
TRACE ID                              STATE             PROVIDER    CLIENT          CAPTURED
11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111  manifest_pending  anthropic   claude-code     2026-07-18T09:42:11.000Z
22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222  manifest_pending  openai      codex           2026-07-18T09:39:04.000Z

跟踪列表仅公开有界的生命周期元数据。 当您故意想要下载、验证、解密和检查底层跟踪之一时，请使用跟踪器探索。

什么留在哪里

地点 数据保存在那里
你的机器 您通过 Traicer 路由的提供商流量；秘密剥离、编辑、规范化、加密、签名密钥和本地库存数据库
您的 S3 兼容存储桶 AES-256-GCM 加密跟踪对象和临时加密传递对象
Traice 市场，连接后 签名的安全元数据：提供者、模型、客户端、小时捕获时间、令牌和工具调用计数、加密大小、编辑计数、哈希和不透明承诺、管道版本和存储完整性状态

Traice Market 不会收到请求或响应主体、提供者或存储凭证、加密密钥、原始对象位置或可重用存储凭证。 “无内容库存”意味着市场接收上面列出的元数据，而不是不接收元数据。 这些字段旨在支持在任何卖家批准的内容交付之前进行兼容性和尺寸检查。

从捕获到选择性出售

  1. 路由一支持的呼叫。 您的编码客户端通过 Traicer 的环回网关或显式代理发送请求。 Traicer 仅接受配置的提供程序、方法和路径。
  2. 在本地保护它。 提供者凭证被转发到固定的 HTTPS 提供者，但传输凭证在构建捕获记录之前被删除。 然后，接受的请求和成功的响应主体将经过编辑和规范化。
  3. 将密文提交到您的存储中。 Traicer 在本地对规范跟踪进行加密，并且仅在卖方存储返回匹配的元数据和字节后才报告捕获成功。
  4. 队列安全元数据。 Tracerer 签署无内容库存记录。 如果没有 Traice Market 帐户，它会保留在持久的本地发件箱中。 添加帐户凭据并重新启动 Traicer 后，启动协调会幂等地提交待处理记录。
  5. 批准任何商业行为。 单独捕获不会创建数据集、接受销售或准备交付。 卖方批准的交付仅解密您计算机上选定的跟踪，为该交付重新加密它们，并创建短暂的买方能力。

协调使现有的本地优先捕获可用于以后的市场工作流程；它不会上传跟踪正文、列出数据集、批准销售或向买家做出承诺。 保留存储桶对象和本地 Traicer 配置，包括其加密的密钥材料，因为 Traicer 需要它们来进行任何后续卖家批准的交付。

要稍后连接帐户，请停止捕获，将 TRAICER_MARKETPLACE_CREDENTIAL 添加到 ~/.config/traicer/.env.local，加密新值，然后重新启动。 下一次启动将协调待处理的安全元数据：

bunx @traice-market/traicer stop
bunx @traice-market/traicer secrets
bunx @traice-market/traicer start --detach

进行第一次捕获

您需要 Anthropic 或 OpenAI 凭证以及专用的 Cloudflare R2、AWS S3 或兼容的 S3 存储桶。 Traice 市场帐户在捕获时是可选的。 桌面应用捆绑本地服务； CLI 需要 Bun 1.3 或更高版本，并且托管 Cloudflare/AWS 部署 shell 必须已安装到 pnpm。

CLI 初始化与 AI 提供商无关：一种存储配置包括 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 捕获路由。 通过 Tracerer 运行启动的客户端或与显示的网关 URL 一起使用的 API 路径，为每个会话选择路由。

完整的 Cloudflare R2 + CLI 路径

该路径创建存储桶并到达可验证的第一条踪迹。 Wrangler 帐户发现和 Alchemy 部署身份验证是分开的：Traicer 仅从 Wrangler 读取公共帐户元数据，而 Alchemy 处理自己的基于浏览器的部署登录。

  1. 安装并验证 Wrangler，然后初始化 Traicer 并显式部署生成的 R2 堆栈：wrangler login Bunx @traice-market/traicer init --storage cloudflare-r2 --deploy
  2. 部署成功后，创建 Cloudflare R2 S3 API 令牌，并将对象读/写访问权限限制为生成的存储桶。 init 不会创建或重用此凭据。 将其访问密钥 ID 和密钥放入 ~/.config/traicer/.env.local 中；保留生成的 varlock(...) 参考文献不变。
  3. 加密外部凭证，在后台启动服务，并确认其存储探测通过：bunx @traice-market/traicer Secrets Bunx @traice-market/traicer start --detach Bunx @traice-market/traicer status
  4. 在您想要与会话关联的存储库中，将其链接一次并通过临时作用域路径启动 Claude：bunx @traice-market/traicer 项目链接 Bunx @traice-market/traicer run -- claude
  5. 发送成功的 Claude 请求，退出会话，然后验证安全本地行并仔细检查它： Bunx @traice-market/traicer 跟踪列表 Bunx @traice-market/traicer explore

对于 AWS 或现有的兼容服务，请使用存储中的匹配命令。 init 永远不会覆盖现有配置，云部署仅在 --deploy 或显式交互批准的情况下进行。

桌面路径

当存储桶和范围 S3 凭证已存在并且您需要引导式配置时，请使用桌面应用程序：

  1. 从最新版本下载 DMG、Windows EXE/MSI 或 Linux DEB 并验证其校验和。
  2. 输入存储桶端点、存储桶名称、区域、前缀和范围存储凭据。 当您还没有 Traice Market 帐户时，请选择本地优先捕获。
  3. 启动 Traicer 并将显示的网关 URL 复制到编码客户端的提供程序基本 URL 设置中，同时保持配置的正常提供程序 API 密钥。
  4. 发送支持的请求并检查本地跟踪生命周期以获取新的安全摘要。

显示的环回URL包含承载能力。 不要提交它，将其放置在共享 shell 配置文件中，或将其包含在屏幕截图和问题中。

今天的修订有什么作用

当前的严格默认管道删除了传输标头，例如授权、cookie、x-api-key、代理授权、OpenAI 组织/项目标头以及任何看起来像密钥、凭证、密码、秘密、会话或令牌的标头名称。 这些标头不是规范跟踪模式的一部分。

在请求和响应正文中，它替换敏感字段名称并识别这些内置字符串模式：

  • 私钥；
  • OpenAI 风格的按键；
  • AWS 访问密钥 ID；
  • JSON 网络令牌；
  • PostgreSQL、MySQL 和 MongoDB 连接 URL；
  • 电子邮件地址。

编辑报告仅记录探测器类别和替换计数。 检测必然是不完整的，因此在提交任何数据集之前，仅路由您愿意检查和使用跟踪器探索的工作。

检查并导出您的痕迹

当守护进程和traice.market处于离线状态时，所有者访问权限会读取本地库存。 Reveal 仅接受已知的本地跟踪 ID、密文哈希或已记录在配置的前缀下的确切对象密钥；它无法浏览任意存储桶键。

# Safe metadata only
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces list

# Interactive TUI with lazy download/decrypt progress
bunx @traice-market/traicer explore

# Deliberate single-trace reveal
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces show <trace-id>

# Explicit export and plaintext-cache control
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces export <trace-id> --output ./trace.json
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces cache status
bunx @traice-market/traicer traces cache clear

在返回明文之前，Tracer 会验证密文哈希、本地解密、验证规范哈希并验证跟踪模式。 检查的明文在配置目录下进行 gzip 压缩，默认上限为 512 MiB，并在 7 天后删除。 终端输出、确认的剪贴板副本、桌面/TUI 详细信息窗格和导出的文件包含敏感纯文本。

捕获和兼容性

Traicer 不会更改系统代理或将自身注入编码工具中。 允许名单之外的固定网关路由将被拒绝；捕获集之外的选定显式代理流量将被转发，而不会成为跟踪。

提供者 成功响应后捕获 转发但未捕获
人择 发布/v1/消息 令牌计数和模型查找
开放人工智能 POST /v1/responses、POST /v1/chat/completions 嵌入和模型查找

提供者转发是失败开放的：如果提供者响应但后来的持久性失败，客户端仍然会收到该响应。 持久性是失败关闭的：未知的策略、解析器、编辑、加密、存储或签名状态不会创建卖方对象或可销售的库存。

兼容性和预览限制

截至 2026 年 7 月 18 日，存储库记录了此验收证据：

表面 目前的证据
macOS 上的 Claude Code 2.1.212 通过 Anthropic Messages 手动端到端验收
OpenAI 回复和聊天完成 单位和综合网关证据
Codex 和 OpenCode 范围启动器 单位和合成发射器证据
macOS 桌面 Apple Silicon 和 Intel DMG 发布；未经公证或生产签名
Windows桌面 EXE/MSI 安装程序已发布；没有生产签名
Debian/Ubuntu 桌面 DEB包发布；清洁机器覆盖率仍然是一个释放门

第一版本威胁模型假设一名本地桌面用户。 Traicer 无法保护痕迹免受以该用户权限运行的恶意软件或受损操作系统的影响。 在通过相应的数据包捕获、清理机器、崩溃恢复和外部审查关卡之前，安全声明仍然是临时的。

文档和支持

  • 入门 — 完整的清洁机器演练。
  • CLI 参考 — 服务命令、路由、跟踪访问和生成的文件。
  • 桌面应用程序 — 安装、本地 CA 信任、更新和捕获控制。
  • 客户端配置 - 固定网关和显式代理设置。
  • 存储 — 所需的权限和存储后端设置。
  • 架构、威胁模型和遥测合约——详细的安全设计。
  • 故障排除 — 启动、路由、存储和捕获故障。

在 GitHub Issues 中公开可重现、无内容的错误。 通过 GitHub 的私人安全咨询流程报告漏洞。 切勿在问题中包含原始跟踪、提示、源代码、凭据、私钥、存储 URL、承载能力的网关 URL 或未经编辑的诊断。

许可证状态

官方软件包和安装程序已发布用于操作员预览评估，但源存储库没有分发许可证。 源可用性不授予重新分发代码、发布修改后的发行版或将 Traicer 描述为开源的权限。
